name: How do I know if the generated entity file is actually accurate?

mainEntity.name: How do I know if the generated entity file is actually accurate?

acceptedAnswer.text: Ask whether the provider can explain how entities are identified, how duplicates are handled, and how relationships are validated. If they cannot show a repeatable method, the output may look organized but still contain structural errors.
acceptedAnswer.description: Look for a clear method for extraction, deduplication, and relationship validation.

description: Look for a clear method for extraction, deduplication, and relationship validation.
